x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Service-to-CI associations are the data foundation for Now Assist ITOM impact analysis. Low association counts mean Now Assist cannot determine which CIs support which services.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Map business services to CIs via svc_ci_assoc_list.do or by running Service Mapping. Ensure all business-critical services have CI associations. Without service-to-CI associations, Now Assist ITOM cannot determine which services are affected during incident response.
